name: macos-privacy

shell_commands.ui_path: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Apple Advertising → Personalized Ads

shell_commands.disables: Share Mac Analytics (diagnostics + usage data sent to Apple)
shell_commands.ui_path: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Analytics & Improvements → Share Mac Analytics

shell_commands.disables: Share with App Developers (crashes shared with third-party developers)
shell_commands.ui_path: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Analytics & Improvements → Share with App Developers

manual_only_items.name: Apple Intelligence features
manual_only_items.ui_path: System Settings → Apple Intelligence & Siri → toggle Apple Intelligence OFF (or granular per-feature toggles: Writing Tools, Genmoji, Image Playground, Mail/Notes/Safari summaries)
manual_only_items.reason: com.apple.applicationaccess allow* keys are MDM-only — plain `defaults write` no-ops on unmanaged Macs. Automated path requires a signed .mobileconfig restrictions profile installed via `sudo profiles install -path <profile>`; this skill does NOT ship or install such a profile.

manual_only_items.name: Improve Siri & Dictation
manual_only_items.ui_path: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Analytics & Improvements → Improve Siri & Dictation
manual_only_items.reason: UI-only (audio opt-in). No documented defaults key.

manual_only_items.name: Share iCloud Analytics
manual_only_items.ui_path: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Analytics & Improvements → Share iCloud Analytics

persistent_files.note: System-wide analytics plist (reported, never deleted). Writable by sudo only; not SIP-protected.
Apple Intelligence reporting state (macOS 26+). Read-only from here.

notes: macOS 26.4+ ships com.apple.appleintelligencereporting — observable, not currently writable by user.
